FarmerProfile.title: FarmerProfile
FarmerProfile.description: Represents a farmer registered with the CropAid Connect system, storing their personal, contact, and agricultural details relevant for subsidy applications and eligibility checks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FarmerProfile entity.

uniqueFarmerIdentifier.description: A unique identifier for the farmer, such as a government-issued ID or a system-assigned identifier, used for eligibility checks and tracking. (e.g., Farmer ID)

firstName.description: The first name of the farmer.

lastName.description: The last name of the farmer.

email.description: The farmer's email address for communication.

addressLine1.description: The first line of the farmer's postal address.

addressLine2.description: The second line of the farmer's postal address (optional).

city.description: The city where the farmer resides.

state.description: The state or province where the farmer resides.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the farmer's address.

country.description: The country where the farmer resides.

dateOfBirth.description: The farmer's date of birth, used for age-related eligibility criteria.

landAreaAcres.description: The total land area owned or cultivated by the farmer, measured in acres, relevant for many subsidy programs.

primaryCropType.description: The main type of crop cultivated by the farmer, influencing relevant subsidy categories.

isRegistered.description: Indicates if the farmer's profile is fully registered and active within the system.

registrationDate.description: The date and time when the farmer's profile was created or first registered in the system.

SubsidyCategory.title: SubsidyCategory
SubsidyCategory.description: Defines the different categories of subsidies available through CropAid Connect, including their criteria, benefits, and application details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SubsidyCategory entity.

name.description: The name of the subsidy category (e.g., 'Fertilizer Subsidy', 'Seed Subsidy', 'Irrigation Subsidy').

description.description: A detailed description of the subsidy, its purpose, and goals.

eligibilityCriteria.description: A comprehensive text detailing the requirements farmers must meet to qualify for this subsidy, used by the eligibility checker.

benefits.description: A description of the advantages or support provided to farmers by this subsidy.

applicationSteps.description: A list of ordered steps a farmer needs to follow to successfully apply for this subsidy.

iconUrl.description: The URL to an icon image representing this subsidy category for UI display.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the subsidy category is currently active and accepting new applications.

Application.title: Application
Application.description: Represents a farmer's formal application for a specific subsidy, tracking its status, submission details, and administrative review.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Application entity.

farmerProfileId.description: Reference to the FarmerProfile entity that submitted this application. (Relationship: FarmerProfile 1:N Application)

subsidyCategoryId.description: Reference to the SubsidyCategory entity that this application is for. (Relationship: SubsidyCategory 1:N Application)

applicationDate.description: The date and time when the application was initially created or started by the farmer.

submissionDate.description: The date and time when the application was formally submitted by the farmer for review.

status.description: The current status of the application (e.g., 'Draft', 'Pending Review', 'Approved', 'Rejected', 'Under Revision').

adminNotes.description: Any notes added by an administrator during the review process or decision-making.

approvalDate.description: The date and time when the application was officially approved.

rejectionDate.description: The date and time when the application was officially rejected.

rejectionReason.description: The reason provided by the administrator if the application was rejected.

Document.title: Document
Document.description: Stores metadata about documents uploaded by farmers to support their subsidy applications, such as proof of identity or land ownership.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Document entity.

applicationId.description: Reference to the Application entity this document is part of. (Relationship: Application 1:N Document)

farmerProfileId.description: Reference to the FarmerProfile entity that uploaded this document. (Relationship: FarmerProfile 1:N Document)

documentType.description: The classification or purpose of the document (e.g., 'Proof of Identity', 'Land Ownership Certificate', 'Bank Statement').

fileName.description: The original name of the uploaded file provided by the user.

storagePath.description: The URI or path where the document is stored in the application's file storage system.

uploadDate.description: The date and time when the document was uploaded to the system.

fileExtension.description: The file extension of the document (e.g., 'pdf', 'jpg', 'png').

definition.description: Global collection for public eligibility lookups. Access is controlled by specific fields (ID).

Stores the unique FarmerProfile for an authenticated user. The 'id' field within the FarmerProfile document will match '{userId}', making 'request.auth.uid' the direct owner. This structure provides strong ownership, simplifying security rules. Includes denormalized 'id' matching 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the farmer.

definition.description: Global collection for all subsidy categories. These documents are publicly readable, providing information on available subsidies, their criteria, and benefits. Writes are restricted to administrators.

params.name: subsidyCategoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific subsidy category.

definition.description: Stores individual subsidy applications submitted by a farmer. The 'farmerProfileId' field will be denormalized to match '{userId}' for robust authorization independence and simplified security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the farmer submitting the application.

params.name: applicationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific application.

definition.description: Stores metadata for documents uploaded by a farmer, related to their applications. The 'farmerProfileId' field will be denormalized to match '{userId}' for authorization independence and simplified security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the farmer who uploaded the document.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific uploaded document.
